comments: Approved. git show --stat --name-only 0c35b19 matches the execution result artifact: the commit changes only src/mcp-server/src/index.ts, src/mcp-server/src/dag-parser.ts, bin/agent-protocol-init, tasks/v0.8-m1-execution-result.json, and tasks/v0.8-m1-result-review-packet.json. src/mcp-server/src/index.ts adds resolveWorkflowStatePath() and checks PROJECT_ROOT/.agent-state/workflow/dispatch.json and iteration-state.json before falling back to workflow/. src/mcp-server/src/dag-parser.ts is created and exports parseWorkflow. bin/agent-protocol-init now scaffolds .agent-state/workflows, .agent-state/tasks, and .agent-state/workflow. No dynamic LLM router, review automation daemons, legacy tool removals, or workflow/dispatch.json state-semantic modifications appear in this implementation commit.
